title: Handmade Wooden Heart Plaque – Friends That Become Family – Hanging Wall Sign with Inspirational Quote – 10cm x 9cm Rustic MDF Heart-Shaped Décor for Home, Gifts for Friends, and Family
features: 🤍 Heartfelt Message – The plaque’s thoughtful quote, "There are Friends, There is Family & then there are Friends that become Family," is a touching reminder of how friendships can grow into unbreakable bonds, making this the perfect gift for best friends who have become like family.

🖤 Beautiful Design – The soft whitewashed MDF wood, coupled with simple yet elegant black lettering, makes this plaque a versatile and stylish decorative piece for any room, complementing both modern and traditional décor styles.

🎁 Perfect Gift for All Occasions – Whether it’s for birthdays, holidays, or as a "just because" gift, this plaque is an ideal present to show appreciation to the special people in your life who have become part of your family.

🏡 Easy to Hang – With its compact size (10cm x 9cm) and attached rustic twine, this plaque is lightweight and easy to hang, making it a lovely addition to a gallery wall, door, or any special space in your home.

🖼️ Handmade Quality – Crafted from high-quality MDF wood, this plaque is carefully made to be both durable and decorative. Its rustic charm adds a warm and personal touch to your home décor, reminding you daily of the value of family and friendship.
description: Product Description Some Of Our Friendship Hanging Plaques Our charming hanging plaques, crafted from high-quality wood, come in a beautiful array of colors and feature thoughtful quotes—perfect for that special keepsake gift for a dear friend. These versatile wooden plaques can be elegantly presented in hampers, gift boxes, or as decorative tags on wine bottles and gift bags. Once gifted, they become cherished accents that can be proudly displayed in the home or office. Take a look around our wooden heart plaques The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. With 1 hole which enables the plaque to be hung on a door, wall, or any chosen space with effortless grace Wood - Indoor Use ONLY Our Wooden option can only be used indoors. This is NOT for outdoor use Just some of the great ways to gift our heart plaques For Gift Hampers Add a touch of sentiment by including the heart plaque in gift hampers and boxes. For Occasion Thank you's Add the heart plaque to a Thank you, Birthday or Christmas gift bag for a charming and heartfelt touch. As Gift Bottle Tags Attach to a favourite wine, champagne bottle or beer hamper for a charming keepsake birthday tag. Gift That Someone Special Our charming hanging plaques are the ideal gift for any occasion. With their delightful designs, they add a touch of elegance to any room. Our heart range of plaques come with twine Come with twine Our plaques come with loose twine for you to tie yourself and cut to length. You can even swap out for ribbon of your choice should you wish Step one Simply fold the twine in half, thread the loop through the hole, thread the twine ends through the loop and pull tight Step two Next tie a knot at the top in the two loose ends to secure and finish the look Final Step! There are two ways to tie the ribbon as shown in the photo. You can also have your chosen length depending on how you are gifting and/or displaying See our other personalised gifts in the friendship range Friends like you!
